title: InspectParallelAxesSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``inspect-parallel-axes`` composite primitive (WS5 #7).

Collapses the multi-``Read`` the ``hpc-build-executor`` / axes-init companion performs once per executor build — reading ``.hpc/tasks.py`` (to identify each parallel dimension) and ``.hpc/axes.yaml`` (to see what's already recorded) — into one pure-query CLI call. Reads files, executes nothing.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory (the one containing ``.hpc/``). Defaults to the current working directory when omitted on the CLI.
